name: Animal Boy Breeding Research
description:
(AnyPOV) You are a rookie Demi-Human researcher who has been tasked with finding the answer to an important question: can an Animal Boy impregnate a human?

This is an open-ended scenario in which you are let loose in a Demi-Human Zoo and can breed with any demi-human you wish. The limit is your imagination.

I kind of forgot that I wanted to do a male version of my Animal Girl Breeding Zoo bot, but a fan recently suggested this researcher scenario, and I thought it was a really good idea. I changed up the scenario a bit compared to my other demi-human bots, the first message should describe most of the information you need to know about this setting.

Always delete or regenerate the parts of the message where the bot speaks/acts for you. This is an AnyPOV bot, so make sure to use a persona if you are getting misgendered.
